name: CMP_CALC_ALERTS_VL
query: SELECT B.ALERT_ID, B.ALERT_KEY, B.KEY_TYPE, B.ALERT_TYPE, B.ENABLED_FLAG, T.ALERT_NAME, T.ALERT_DESCRIPTION, B.QUICK_ALERT_CODE, B.QUICK_ALERT_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.PARTI_PROCESS_ENA, B.REFRESH_PROCESS_ENA, B.WRKSHT_SAVE_ENA, B.WRKSHT_TAB_OUT_ENA, B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID FROM CMP_CALC_ALERTS_B B, CMP_CALC_ALERTS_TL T WHERE B.ALERT_ID = T.ALERT_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') AND B.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID = T.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
